full_description: Focus Mode is an innovative app designed to help users stay concentrated and avoid distractions, providing a productive environment for work and study. It blocks social media and other distracting websites, allowing you to stay on track and achieve your goals. With Focus Mode, you can create a customized block list, set a schedule for focus sessions, and track your productivity. The app also provides features such as website blocking, app blocking, and a focus timer to help you stay on track. Whether you're a student, professional, or simply looking to boost your productivity, Focus Mode is the perfect tool to help you stay focused and achieve your goals.
